members.error: validation failed twice: weaknesses item invalid

strengths: src/utils/permissions.ts implements WORKSPACE_ROOT boundary checks before file operations, reducing arbitrary filesystem write surface.
src/utils/kill_switch.ts isolates PowerShell ESC abort logic to a single module, making execution policy failures localized and testable.
build_sea.mjs packages application as single executable, reducing attack surface from loose script files if properly signed.
dotenv usage (inferred from external stack) suggests secrets are externalized; no hardcoded credentials visible in scanned modules.
Playwright browser automation sandboxed to separate process; direct LLM output does not directly control renderer without intermediate stepping.
@nut-tree-fork/nut-js desktop automation is isolated to nut-js module call sites, not globally injected into LLM context.
weaknesses: src/utils/runner.ts execSync() accepts untrusted command strings with no input validation, timeout, or privilege checks; LLM-generated commands execute directly on Windows shell.
src/utils/permissions.ts WORKSPACE_ROOT fallback to cwd without realpath() call; symlink-based path traversal could escape workspace boundary if cwd is a symlink.
missions/ folder entirely unscanned due to 90s timeout; mission logic, LLM prompt injection vectors, and credential usage are unverified — cannot assess agent decision gates.
scripts/a4_run.ts hardcodes C:\Users\angel\ paths and silently swallows JSON.parse() errors; if LLM returns malformed output, error is hidden and execution continues.
src/watchers/hermes_watcher.ts lacks 429 and 5xx retry logic; DoS on GitHub API exhausts agent's ability to check for updates, no circuit breaker.
No package-lock.json visible per report; npm install with semver ranges allows transitive dependency injection attacks if a compromised minor version is published.
recommendations: Refactor src/utils/runner.ts to accept command arguments as an array (not string), use execFile() instead of execSync(), and add a 30s timeout with signal handling.
Update src/utils/permissions.ts to call require('path').resolve(process.cwd()) and fs.realpathSync() before boundary checks to neutralize symlink traversal.
Add unit test to src/utils/permissions.ts covering symlink-as-cwd case; verify WORKSPACE_ROOT resolves outside attacker-controlled link.
Implement retry + exponential backoff with 429/5xx detection in src/watchers/hermes_watcher.ts; add jitter and max-retry cap to prevent lockup.
Generate and commit package-lock.json to repo; pin all transitive dependencies in CI to block semver-range injection from npm registry.
Prioritize scan of missions/ folder: implement timeout increase (120s+) or split mission.ts into smaller chunks; unverified LLM decision logic is the highest-risk gap.
